landing.heroTitle: The CFO your company always needed. Without the cost of a human.
landing.heroSubtitle: Fineloia turns your financial data into strategic decisions with forecasts, risk alerts, automated reporting, and an AI advisor that speaks your language.
features: Smart alerts for treasury and margin

faq.q: Can Fineloia move money or make payments?
faq.a: No. Fineloia only analyzes data and gives recommendations. Execution always remains with your team.

faq.q: Do I need a banking license to use it?
faq.a: No. This is an analytics and advisory platform, not a banking product.
Yes. You can upload CSV files, map columns, and auto-categorize transactions with AI.
